item.title: Remove TODO placeholder links from docs/PROBLEMS.md
item.intent: Either fill in the evidence links (TODO: Link forum posts, TODO: Link articles) in PROBLEMS.md or remove the placeholder text so the document looks complete
steps: Review all TODO placeholders in PROBLEMS.md
Search for relevant evidence links or remove the placeholders
Ensure the document reads cleanly without dangling TODOs
acceptanceCriteria: No TODO placeholders remain in PROBLEMS.md
